name: Jujutsu Kaisen | CANON
description:
"Take me back to the night we met..."

A time before everything fell apart, when it was just the school and slightly dangerous missions rather than a fight to the death.

Characters Included:

Gojo Satoru

Itadori Yuji

Kugisaki Nobara

Fushiguro Megumi

Sukuna (Within Yuji)

Inumaki Toge

Panda

Okkotsu Yuta

Zen'in Maki

Nanami Kento

Side characters have been included via lorebooks and may need name-calling to appear! They are:

Shoko Ieiri

Kyoto School Characters (Utahime, Gakuganji, Aoi Todo, Zenin Mai etc.)

Zenin Clan Characters (Naoya, Ranta etc.)

Ages haven't been altered, everything is canon but please do not make it weird. This was made as a way for therapy lowkey because what was JJK... </3

Some creative liberties were taken, have made Nanami a second-year teacher and other mechanics and information (in lorebooks) have been sourced from official sites.

High token bot when including lorebooks, with this much richness, it may make mistakes. However as far as I've tested, it remains consistent :3

My testers were with Gem and DS, both do pretty well being consistent. If minor lore-wise mistakes are made, its best to just edit it out or change it. But if you notice an error made repeatedly, please let me know! <3

☆ Edit ☆

1 - Sukuna seems to appear less in chat, so I have added a second message to encourage his Appearance. Otherwise just mention 'prioritise <character>' in your chat to bring him out <3

2 - Changed the ages to 18 so there's no flagging TT, it shouldn't change any roleplay mechanics or personality changes in the characters! If it really matters, mention the accurate ages in chat memory or by 'OOC'
creator: Echonis
